title: Join the monday code Scheduler Beta
excerpt:

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re opening a beta group for monday code’s Scheduler Support!

With this new capability, you will be able to run your app’s logic, exposed via a URL, on a recurring basis using cron expressions, all directly from the CLI.
Joining a beta group means you’ll have to provide feedback and suggest ideas on our closed Slack group, along with reporting bugs if they happen.

Apply here
